name: Midazolam
description: Benzodiazepine oo shaqaynaysa oo gaaban oo si degdeg ah u bilawday. Loo door bidayo suuxinta nidaamka, daawaynta hore ee RSI, iyo maaraynta suuxdinta IM/IN IM iyo dariiqyada sanka gudahiisa ayaa faa'iido weyn ka bixiya goobaha goobta.
indications: Daawooyinka hore ee RSI (oo leh ketamine)
Maareynta qalalka (IM/IN marka IV la waayo)
dose: Suuxinta: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV titrated. Habka: 1-5 mg IV riixid tartiib ah. IM: 0.2 mg/kg. IN: 0.2 mg/kg (ugu badnaan 10 mg). Xaaladda suuxdinta IM: 10 mg IM (qof weyn).
contraindications: glaucoma ba'an oo xagal cidhiidhi ah
Khamri ba'an oo ku sakhraansan oo leh is-afgaranwaa wadnaha iyo xididdada dhiigga
warnings: Niyad-jabka Neefsashada -- la soco marin-haweedka, hay wakiilka beddelka ah (flumazenil) haddii la heli karo.
Cirridka IV-ga ee degdega ah wuxuu keenaa apnea -- si tartiib ah u riix.

pediatric.dose: Suuxinta: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV. IM: 0.1-0.2 mg/kg. Gudaha: 0.2-0.3 mg/kg. Suuxdin IM: 0.2 mg/kg (ugu badnaan 10 mg).
pediatric.note: Jidka dhexdiisa gaar ahaan waxtar u leh carruurta -- waxay ka fogaataa gelitaanka IV-ga.

obstetric.note: Ka gudubta mandheerta. Suuxinta dhallaanka waa suurtagal. Isticmaal qiyaasta ugu yar ee waxtarka leh; la soco ilmaha dhasha haddii la siiyo meel u dhow dhalmada.

source: JTS CPG / Standard Procedural Sedation Guidelines
